items.name_en: 💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】New best-selling vintage-style shoulder bag, made from new soft lambskin, soft and premium leather. This Aventure leather handbag is inspired by the 09 M-series vintage design, with a restructured silhouette that reinterprets a unique shape, exuding a new personality. Embellished with embossed letter logo, adding a signature element. Retro gold hardware, linen blend lining, with a zip pocket inside. Long handle suitable for hand or shoulder carry.
items.name_cn:
💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】New best-selling vintage-style shoulder bag, made from new soft lambskin, soft and premium leather. This Aventure leather handbag is inspired by the 09 M-series vintage design, with a restructured silhouette that reinterprets a unique shape, exuding a new personality. Embellished with embossed letter logo, adding a signature element. Retro gold hardware, linen blend lining, with a zip pocket inside. Long handle suitable for hand or shoulder carry.
Model: 5BC182.
Size 33x19x5cm
Color: Black/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 😘5BB172MiuMiu Cherry New Size Briefcase, latest two-tone design, made of top-grade imported calfskin, smooth and delicate texture, cotton satin lining. This bag is cool, capturing an exquisite multi-functional design that blends menswear and womenswear elements. Casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Extra-large capacity yet lightweight, simple yet not simplistic. The new size offers better fit; almost every fashion blogger has one.

items.name_en: 😘5BB173MiuMiu Cherry New Bowling Bag, latest two-tone design, made of ultra-soft calfskin. The bold innovative design perfectly interprets MiuMiu's unconventional and free-spirited attitude. This bag is cool, capturing an exquisite multi-functional design that blends menswear and womenswear elements. Casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. New canvas lining. It's no wonder it's popular all over the internet; fashion bloggers and celebrities love it.

items.name_en: 5B, Miu's new mini bowling bag. This Arcadie leather mini handbag translates the fashion concept of transforming reflections on current reality into a unique silhouette. The soft and full design makes the bag look more voluminous, fully displaying a metropolitan style. Matching tone letter logo, endowing this handbag with unique beauty and a classic atmosphere. Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, cotton satin lining with card slot. Dimensions: 19X10X5cm
